v2_changes: Added whale intelligence module (35% ensemble weight)
Removed Monte Carlo and Variance Reduction from probability estimation
New ensemble: Whale 35%, Particle Filter 25%, ABM 20%, Copula 15%, Microstructure 5%
Strict multi-gate filter: min 5% edge, $1M volume, whale confirmation, 3/5 layer agreement
High confidence requires: whale alignment + edge > 15% + z > 4.0
Price range filter: reject markets < 0.08 or > 0.92
Fractional Kelly sizing with whale confidence multiplier
